channel.title: Zhonghao Energy Industrial Material Insights
channel.description: Specification-led industrial material guidance for overseas buyers.

item.title: Carbon Powder for Iron Foundry Carburizing: Buyer Checklist
item.description: How foundry buyers can define carbon powder requirements by furnace, base iron, chemistry, particle size, recovery and trial method.

item.title: Carbon Powder for Steelmaking Carbon Adjustment
item.description: A procurement framework for defining carbon adjustment material by steel grade, furnace, chemistry, particle size and recovery target.

item.title: Magnesium for Steel Desulfurization: Process and Safety Questions
item.description: A qualification checklist for discussing magnesium metal in iron and steel desulfurization, including form, purity and handling.

item.title: Magnesium Ingot for Aluminum Alloying: Grade and Impurity Review
item.description: A buyer guide to comparing Mg99.95 and Mg99.90 for aluminum-alloy preparation, including impurities, ingot format and inspection.

item.title: Magnesium Ingot for Die Casting: Feedstock Qualification Questions
item.description: Questions for qualifying primary magnesium used in die-casting alloy preparation, from chemistry and ingot condition to traceability.

item.title: PE for Blow-Molded Bottles and Containers
item.description: A buyer checklist for matching PE to blow-molded containers by size, contents, line, stiffness, impact, ESCR and compliance.

item.title: PE for Film and Flexible Packaging: Grade-Selection Inputs
item.description: The information needed to match HDPE, LDPE or LLDPE to a film line, package structure, sealing, optics and compliance requirements.

item.title: PE for Pipe and Extrusion: Start with the Standard
item.description: How to prepare a PE pipe or profile inquiry using the product standard, service conditions, process and producer qualification.

item.title: PP for Fiber and Nonwoven: Process-Led Grade Selection
item.description: A sourcing guide for PP fiber and nonwoven grades based on spinning route, melt flow, filtration, strength, softness and compliance.

item.title: PP for Injection Molding: How to Define the Grade
item.description: A framework for matching PP family and grade to a molded part using flow, impact, stiffness, shrinkage, appearance and compliance.

item.title: PP for Raffia and Woven Bags: Tape-Line RFQ Guide
item.description: The inputs needed to discuss PP raffia grades by tape line, drawability, tensile performance, bag construction and additives.

item.title: Semi Coke COA, Sampling and Inspection Checklist
item.description: How to connect a Semi Coke COA to the correct product, lot, sampling method, test basis and buyer acceptance process.

item.title: Semi Coke for Calcium Carbide Production: RFQ and Burden Checklist
item.description: How to discuss Semi Coke with reference to carbide furnace practice, lime burden, available carbon, impurities, moisture and particle size.

item.title: Semi Coke for Ferroalloy Production: A Buyer Qualification Guide
item.description: How to connect ferroalloy furnace requirements with Semi Coke chemistry, size distribution, inspection and trial planning.

item.title: Semi Coke for Silicon Metal Smelting: What Buyers Should Confirm
item.description: A practical review of carbon, ash chemistry, phosphorus, size and trial requirements for discussing Semi Coke in silicon metal furnaces.

item.title: Semi Coke Packing, Moisture and Loading Questions
item.description: Questions to align bag format, net weight, markings, moisture protection, handling and loading before a Semi Coke order.

item.title: Semi Coke Particle Size and Fines: What to Put in the Order
item.description: A practical guide to defining Semi Coke size range, fines, oversize, sampling point and delivered acceptance.

item.title: Carbon Raiser: How to Review Fixed Carbon and Particle Size
item.description: A buyer-focused explanation of fixed carbon, sulfur, phosphorus, ash, alumina, moisture and size for Carbon Raiser RFQs.

item.title: COA and Industrial Material Inspection: A Buyer Checklist
item.description: Clarify product identity, batch, indicators, sampling, inspection responsibility and document timing before an industrial material order.

item.title: Formed Coke vs Conventional Coke: What Buyers Should Compare
item.description: Understand how product form, fixed carbon, ash, sulfur, moisture, size and calorific value shape a Formed Coke sourcing discussion.

item.title: How to Read an Industrial Material Specification Table
item.description: Learn to compare indicators, units, minimum and maximum limits, ranges, grades, size and order notes without mixing product data.

item.title: Industrial Material Buyer FAQ: From Specification to RFQ
item.description: Answers to common buyer questions about product matching, catalog values, samples, inspection, packing, documents, quotation and order confirmation.

item.title: Magnesium Ingot Grades: Understanding Mg99.95 and Mg99.90
item.description: Compare Mg99.95 and Mg99.90 catalog grades, impurity limits, reference ingot dimensions and order confirmation points.

item.title: Packaging, Containers and Export Coordination for Industrial Materials
item.description: A practical framework for confirming packing format, markings, loading, destination and shipment documents in an industrial material RFQ.

item.title: Semi Coke Buying Guide: Specifications, Size and RFQ Checklist
item.description: A practical checklist for comparing Semi Coke offers by fixed carbon, sulfur, phosphorus, ash, moisture and particle size.
